overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a circular gothic council chamber with deep blue walls, pointed arch stained glass windows, and robed figures seated around a large curved wooden table. The scene features ornate chandeliers, detailed stone architecture, and a mystical atmosphere typical of a wizarding school or fantasy setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular gothic council chamber with stained glass windows

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the council meeting from a fixed vantage point overlooking the curved table

notable_agents.action: robed figure seated at the curved table, facing inward toward the center of the room
robed figure with back to camera, seated and participating in the meeting

entered.detail: massive circular wooden conference table with ornate edge detailing dominating the center of the room
tall pointed arch windows with intricate tracery and blue-tinted glass along the curved back wall
elaborate metal chandelier with multiple candle-style lights hanging from the domed ceiling
deep blue stone walls with gold trim and gothic architectural details including pointed arches
large framed paintings or tapestries hanging on the left wall between the windows
polished stone floor with circular patterns reflecting the room's architecture

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand circular chamber with gothic architecture, featuring deep blue walls and tall pointed arch windows. Several robed figures sit around a massive curved wooden table, suggesting a formal meeting or council session. The room is illuminated by a combination of natural light through stained glass and ornate chandeliers, creating a mystical and solemn atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic gaze into a grand gothic council chamber that maintains a solemn and mystical atmosphere. It begins with a wide view of the circular room, where deep blue walls and tall pointed arch windows establish a sense of imposing scale. The camera lingers on the robed figures seated around a massive curved wooden table, emphasizing the formality of the council session. This stillness allows the interplay of natural light filtering through stained glass and the glow of ornate chandeliers to define the space, finally settling into a mood of quiet, arcane authority.
